rules: Always use rounded corners (rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl)
Animations should be slow and floaty, not fast or jerky
Text should feel like a personal note

usage.date: font-body text-sm font-bold tracking-widest uppercase text-romantic-pink

sections.name: Hero
sections.style: h-screen flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center relative overflow-hidden

sections.name: MusicPlayer
sections.style: fixed bottom-4 right-4 z-50 glass-panel p-4 rounded-full flex items-center gap-4 shadow-xl border border-white/40

MonthCard.structure: Glassmorphic card with photo on one side (or top) and text on the other. Alternating layout for desktop.
MonthCard.styling: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/50 shadow-lg rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform duration-500
MonthCard.image_style: rounded-2xl shadow-md w-full h-64 md:h-80 object-cover

HeartBackground.instruction: Create a CSS animation of floating hearts rising from bottom to top with varying sizes and opacities.

MusicPlayer.instruction: Simple play/pause button with a progress bar or just a spinning vinyl icon. Must auto-play if possible (browser permitting) or have a clear 'Play for Vibes' button.

music.implementation_note: Use react-player/youtube or a hidden iframe. Since autoplay is often blocked, provide a beautiful Play button in the center initially or in the corner.

effects.fireworks: Use canvas-confetti with heart shapes on load.
effects.card_entry: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 50 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }} transition={{ duration: 0.8 }}
effects.floating_hearts: CSS keyframes for background hearts moving upwards.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install dependencies: `npm install framer-motion canvas-confetti react-player lucide-react`
2. Setup Tailwind config with the 'romantic' colors defined above.
3. Add the Google Fonts import to `index.css`.
5. Ensure the design is mobile-responsive. The cards should stack vertically on mobile.
6. The 'Firework' effect should trigger immediately when the page loads.
7. Music player should be unobtrusive but accessible.
8. Use specific heartfelt dummy text for the 3 months if not provided (e.g., 'The day we met...', 'Our first trip...', 'Getting closer...').
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gray borders. Use tinted borders (pink-200).
